title: A to Z 7287 Garage and Petrol Station Playset, 4 level garage
description: Product Description This toy Garage is a must have for all little car lovers, finished in nice bright colours. The Garge is approximatly 36cm height and 56cm width. The set also comes with four cars and a helicopter to push around the Garage . Push the cars up and down the ramp or put them in the lift to move up and down, this set is suitable for children aged three years old and above. The beautifully finished set features a range of lovely details, making the whole set super realistic whilst also being extremely durable. Safety Warning not appropriate for children under the age of 3 Box Contains 1 x Toy Garage;4 Toy Cars;1 Toy Helicopter See more
